subject: Gaming
title: Crypt of the NecroDancer: Move to the Beat
description: One-minute skill: Crypt of the NecroDancer: Move to the Beat.

hook.text: A dungeon crawler where you must move to the beat of the music. Miss the rhythm and you can't move at all.

buildup.text: Brace Yourself Games merged roguelikes with rhythm gaming. Every action must sync to the soundtrack's tempo.

discovery.text: Danny Baranowsky composed the soundtrack. Each zone has faster tempos, making the game harder through music.

twist.text: Players can import their own music. The game generates levels based on any song's tempo and structure.

climax.text: NecroDancer showed that music can be a core constraint, not just decoration. Rhythm shapes every design choice.

punchline.text: Move to the beat or die. Music became the rules of the game.

quiz.question: What happens if you miss the beat in Crypt of the NecroDancer?
